speedscope-notification-link-view: Label of the link to the speedscope UI for the profile; displayed in the speedscope notification.
speedscope-notification-link-json: Label of the link to the JSON of the profile; displayed in the speedscope notification.
speedscope-notification-link-metadata: Label of the link to the metadata of the profile; displayed in the speedscope notification.
speedscope-notification-success: Title of the speedscope notification, indicating success.
